entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Rule-Validation-WritingDataIntoFile11 Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE List PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <List> <Identity created="1714564167241" id="spadmin" lastLogin="1739506502895" lastRefresh="1739335150647" modified="1739512269357" name="spadmin" password="1:ACP:HlGWKB+ytzdhYPNN2aCFqewVfy3JpGJejgWt5cWSlXE=" protected="true" significantModified="1738596039225"> <Attributes> <Map> <entry key="displayName" value="The Administrator"/> <entry key="email" value="spadmin@email.com"/> <entry key="firstname" value="The"/> <entry key="lastname" value="Administrator"/> </Map> </Attributes> <UIPreferencesRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.UIPreferences" id="c0a81d899054143f81905564c0a2030a"/> </UIPreferencesRef> <Capabilities> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.Capability" id="LogsTailPluginCapability" name="LogsTailPluginCapability"/> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.Capability" id="SyslogAdministrator" name="SyslogAdministrator"/> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.Capability" id="SystemAdministrator" name="SystemAdministrator"/> </Capabilities> <Preferences> <Map> <entry key="forward" value="Admins"/> </Map> </Preferences> <Scorecard created="1719421051267" id="c0a81d899054143f8190557b218003e4"/> </Identity> </List>
